title: Besoeker wen parkrun
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NUUS - 'n Besoeker, James Trotter, was Saterdag die vinnigste atleet van die 395ste Oudtshoorn-parkrun wat elke Saterdag by die Surval-olyflandgoed aangebied word.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NUUS - 'n Besoeker, James Trotter, was Saterdag die vinnigste atleet van die 395ste Oudtshoorn-parkrun wat elke Saterdag by die Surval-olyflandgoed aangebied word."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jessica Lategan was tweede met Rozanne Theart wat in die derde plek was. Altesaam 41 drawwers het deelgeneem.","html":"Jessica Lategan was tweede met Rozanne Theart wat in die derde plek was. Altesaam 41 drawwers het deelgeneem."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Die voorste 10 drawwers is as volg:","html":"Die voorste 10 drawwers is as volg:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"James Trotter (22:12)","html":"James Trotter (22:12)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jessica Lategan (23:38)","html":"Jessica Lategan (23:38)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rozanne Theart (25:38)","html":"Rozanne Theart (25:38)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jacques Viljoen (29:36)","html":"Jacques Viljoen (29:36)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Andre du Toit (30:30)","html":"Andre du Toit (30:30)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Carel Swiegelaar (31:01)","html":"Carel Swiegelaar (31:01)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Riaan Lodewyks (31:41)","html":"Riaan Lodewyks (31:41)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mathys Myburgh (31:40)","html":"Mathys Myburgh (31:40)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nico Myburgh (32:52)","html":"Nico Myburgh (32:52)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zara Rudnick (34:29)","html":"Zara Rudnick (34:29)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]
